title: nervilia peltata
intro: Nervilia peltata, also known as the yellow peltate Nervilia, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Nervilia peltata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Nervilia peltata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential side effects.
